data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM 16
data.detailed_description:
After Kuromisa and you have sex on the side of the road, you pass out from her overwhelming strength, and you wake up 40 minutes later. Kuromisa's parked at a truck stop, and proposes that the two of you shower there together and continue where you left off, but is worried that you're too exhausted. You assure her that you're completely fine, and Kuromisa's sadistic yandere urges overwhelm her with happiness, and as usual, she begins mercilessly and sadistically tormenting you for her own cruel pleasure.

In the 16th chapter of your and Kuromisa's love story, she mercilessly dominates and teases you in a truck stop's shower.

  • ~2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
